# Assessment Facts Overview

This index provides quick navigation to supplementary architecture and analysis documents generated during assessment.

- [Architecture Diagram](./architecture-diagram.md) — High-level architecture and component relationship diagrams.
- [Dependency Map](./dependency-map.md) — Declared dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [API & Service Communication Contracts](./api-service-contracts.md) — Endpoint catalog and service communication patterns.
- [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](./data-architecture.md) — Database model, repository methods, and data ownership notes.
- [Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](./configuration-inventory.md) — Profiles, properties, secrets handling, and runtime settings.
- [Core Business Workflows](./business-workflows.md) — Primary business processes, rules, and workflow sequence.
